narration: The day you signed a whole life insurance policy, your agent pocketed a commission worth your entire first year of premiums. That money came straight out of your financial future.
visual: Dark background. Large bold text 'WHOLE LIFE INSURANCE IS A TRAP' slides up from bottom. Commission check SVG springs in showing '$5,700' payable to 'Your Insurance Agent.' Red accent throughout.

narration: They pitch it as two-in-one: life insurance plus a savings account that builds cash value over time. Sounds smart, right? Here's what they conveniently leave out.
visual: Light background. Two boxes slide in from opposite sides — a red shield (protection) and a gold coin with dollar sign (savings). Text 'THE PITCH' above. Reveal box: 'SOUNDS SMART. DO THE MATH FIRST.'

narration: Whole life costs around $500 a month for $500,000 in coverage. The same coverage with term life? Twenty-five dollars a month. That's a $475 monthly gap you're throwing away.
visual: Dark background. Two bars animate upward — tall red bar labeled 'WHOLE LIFE $500/mo' vs tiny grey bar labeled 'TERM $25/mo'. Box below highlights '$475 / MONTH — YOU'RE OVERPAYING.'

narration: Insurance agents earn 50 to 110 percent of your first year's premium in commission. On a $500-a-month policy, that's $5,700 straight to them before your savings earns a single cent.
visual: Light background. Client and agent figures with red money arrows flowing between them. Badge shows '50–110% COMMISSION'. Amount '$5,700 DAY ONE' appears in red below.

narration: Buy term instead and invest that $475 difference at eight percent. In 30 years you'd have $695,000. That's nearly $700K your agent never offered to show you.
visual: Dark background. Two side-by-side growing bars — grey 'WHOLE LIFE CASH VALUE ~$80K' vs tall green 'TERM + INVEST $695,000'. 30-year label below. Subtitle: 'YOUR AGENT NEVER SHOWED YOU THIS.'

narration: Seven in ten whole life policies are surrendered before they ever pay out. Buy term, invest the rest, and keep what's yours. That's the move they don't want you to make.
visual: Light background. Person silhouette walking confidently. Green piggy bank growing with dollar sign. Stat box: '7 IN 10 POLICIES SURRENDERED BEFORE PAYOUT.' Red CTA button: 'BUY TERM. INVEST THE REST.'
